Authored-only (live-only consent boundary): kind=authored, not done. USER must (1) create a Grafana Cloud service account with annotation-write (Editor) role and generate a token; (2) set the GitHub Actions secret GRAFANA_ANNOTATIONS_TOKEN and the repository variable GRAFANA_URL (base instance URL, e.g. https://<slug>.grafana.net) on this repo — names are character-coupled to deploy-fleet.yml settle-down; (3) confirm on the next production deploy-fleet.yml rollout that a per-cluster annotation (tags deploy/cluster:oregon|seoul/sha:<full-sha>) appears in Grafana (Done-When item 7). POST is non-fatal (curl --fail || ::warning::) so an unprovisioned secret degrades to a warning, not a failed deploy.
